## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Dee Salvador for the evolving Account Strategist role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Role Evolution:** The Account Strategist role is shifting from a generalist to a dedicated client owner for 8–9 accounts, managing relationships and scope while delegating content creation to Managing Editors.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [**Candidate Profile:** Dee Salvador, an SEO Program Manager at Kuno Creative, has a background in psychology and leadership, managing large account portfolios (70–90) and teams (5–9).](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [**Core Challenge:** The primary client challenge is balancing the need for rapid content output (for AEO) with client demands for perfection, which slows down the publishing process.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
  - [**Strategic Fit:** Dee's SEO/AEO expertise is a strong fit for translating high-level strategy from Directors into actionable content plans for clients.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1861.0)

## Topics

### The Evolving Account Strategist Role

  - [**Business Model:** GrowthX is an agency using an internal AI platform to generate organic blog content (5 articles/week). This platform will eventually become an external product.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [**New Team Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
      - [**Account Strategist:** Owns 8–9 accounts. Manages client relationships, scope, and renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
      - [**Managing Editor:** Creates content for 2–3 clients using the AI platform.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
      - [**Directors:** A pool of floating experts (SEO, AEO) providing deep strategic support on demand.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Focus:** The role is a client success function, not sales. It requires marketing expertise to present as an expert and build trust.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)

### Candidate Profile: Dee Salvador

  - [**Background:** Psychology degree; Master's in Clinical Mental Health Counseling.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [**Current Role (Kuno Creative):** SEO Program Manager.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
      - [Main POC for all accounts, from pitches to execution.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
      - [Collaborates with content writers on outlines and keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
      - [Involved in renewal discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [**Past Leadership Roles (Neil Patel Digital, Grow, Logical Position):**](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [Managed teams of 5–9 SEO strategists.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
      - [Oversaw large account portfolios (70–90 accounts).](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [Shifted from leadership to a strategic role to focus on implementation and direct results.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)

### Account Management Philosophy & Skills

  - [**Core Philosophy:** Build trust and transparency through active listening and invested questioning.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [**Project Management:**](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
      - [Uses calendar time-blocking and Basecamp for task tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
      - [Prioritizes by identifying and resolving easy roadblocks first to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
  - [**Client Management Example:**](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
      - [**Problem:** A client's glossary page was off-topic after a content writer was removed from scope.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
      - [**Action:** Dee transparently explained the situation, proposed repurposing the content as an educational blog, and managed the 3-week process to publication.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)

### GrowthX Context & Challenges

  - [**Client Pain Points:**](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
      - [**AEO Optimization:** The primary driver for new clients.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
      - [**Perfectionism vs. Velocity:** Clients often prioritize minor edits over rapid publishing, hindering AEO goals.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
  - [**Internal Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
      - [**SEO:** SEMrush, Scrunch](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
      - [**Analytics:** GSC, GA4](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
      - [**Project Mgmt:** Linear (engineering), Airtable (client updates)](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
      - [**Communication:** Slack, Notion, Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [**Culture & Growth:**](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Building morale is difficult with a global, remote team and a high-growth phase requiring significant focus on work.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
      - [**Support:** Training and certifications are approved on a case-by-case basis if relevant to the role.](https://fathom.video/share/151Xom7Zw3Kc-UL3EVaXFb7knbqPabMx?tab=summary&timestamp=2063.0)
